opportunities.title: Ground Control Station Software Engineer - N3XT Interceptor C‑UAS (m/f/d)
opportunities.description:
About the Role

At Quantum Systems, our interceptor systems are not only drones. They are complete operational systems consisting of aircraft, ground control stations, sensor inputs, communication links, launch infrastructure, charging systems, operator interfaces, and data flows.

We are looking for a Ground Control Station Software Engineer to develop and improve the software stack that connects these elements into one reliable and low-latency operator system. You will work on frontend and backend components of our control station software, including radar-track visualization,

opportunities.title: [Hiring] - UX/Product Designer - mobile app, reward & habit loops (US company, top pay, remote)
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] - UX/Product Designer - mobile app, reward & habit loops (US company, top pay, remote)

Hey all, Short version of my background: previously co-founded a company we scaled past $25M ARR & grew a consumer app to 10M ARR / 25M+ users. Now we're building an AI-native mobile entertainment app and we're looking for a UX/product designer to own how the whole thing feels and flows. In mobile, the prettiest app doesn't win, the one engineered around reward loops and habit does. Anyone can design nice screens. opportunities.title: [Hiring] Online - Bathroom Designer
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Online - Bathroom Designer

Looking for someone who can design a master bathroom from photos and measurements. Need a floor plan, 3D renderings, and a complete list for materials like: tile, flooring, wall color. I already have a rough sketch and dimensions. Remote/virtual designers are fine. Any recommendations or anyone interested? Budget starts $100. Not sure if thats fair but open to negotiation!   submitted by   /u/wannabetradhousewife [link]   [comments]

opportunities.title: Computer Vision & AI Engineer - N3XT Interceptor C‑UAS (m/f/d)
opportunities.description:
About the Role

At Quantum Systems, we are building highly autonomous interceptor systems that must perceive, decide, and act under extreme latency, motion, and environmental constraints.

We are looking for a Computer Vision & AI Engineer to drive the perception stack of our Counter-UAS interceptor platform. You will work on low-latency camera pipelines, small-object detection, object tracking, sensor fusion, visual odometry, precision landing, camera calibration, embedded inference, and data pipelines for training and validation.
